name: Command A Translate (08-2025)
tagline: Translation-specialized 111B model across 23 languages, 16K total context (8K in / 8K out), runs on one or two GPUs; secure private deployment option.
seoTitle: Command A Translate (08-2025) — Cohere LLM specs
metaDescription: Command A Translate (08-2025) (Cohere), released 2025-08-28 — part of the Command A Translate line. Translation-specialized 111B model across 23 languages, 16K…
overview: Command A Translate (08-2025) is a large language model from Cohere, part of the Command A Translate line. Released 2025-08-28. Dedicated enterprise translation model for 23 business languages.
What's notable in this version: Translation-specialized 111B model across 23 languages, 16K total context (8K in / 8K out), runs on one or two GPUs; secure private deployment option.
